title: Create imagestream during oc copy
body:
With `atomic:` transport type destination we need skopeo to create an empty imagestream during copy workflow. During docker push to the openshift registry this occurs automatically. This is  a request to match the docker push workflow.

API docs: https://docs.openshift.org/latest/rest_api/openshift_v1.html#create-a-imagestream

comments.body: @runcom would it be possible to get this in? The alternative means an awkward extra command `oc create is STREAM`.
@mtrmac is this PR a dependency for this?  https://github.com/containers/image/pull/95
Not a dependency; a supposed fix. Care to test today’s integrate-all-the-things?
